message:
style(tools,tui,db): idiomatic Rust cleanup and clippy lint fixes

identity.rs:
- Remove unnecessary async from resolve_pane_identity and
  cleanup_pane_identities -- both functions perform only synchronous
  filesystem operations; the async wrapper added overhead with no benefit.
- Replace match on Option with map_or_else for more idiomatic Result
  construction.
- Fix doc comment: escape $TMUX_PANE with backticks for rustdoc.

search.rs:
- Relax &mut self to &self on toggle_detail_view_mode,
  handle_json_tree_navigation, and scroll_detail_by -- all mutation goes
  through interior mutability (Cell/RefCell), so exclusive borrows are
  not required and &self allows more flexible call sites.
- Add trailing semicolons to match-arm expressions that return unit,
  silencing clippy::semicolon_if_nothing_returned.
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)] to compose_detail_text to
  suppress the lint on a function whose parameter count is inherent to
  its rendering responsibility.

pool.rs:
- Reformat let-chain conditional to satisfy rustfmt line-width rules.
- Reformat multi-line query_sync call for consistency.
- Add #[allow(clippy::result_large_err)] on two test functions that
  intentionally return large Result types for assertion convenience.

schema.rs:
- Simplify r#"..."# raw string literals to r"..." where the enclosed
  SQL contains no double quotes, removing unnecessary delimiter noise.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
